name: Bridget Christie
blurb: Her feminist-themed show A Bic for Her won the 2013 Edinburgh Comedy Award for Best Show and became one of the defining comedy shows of the decade.
bio: Bridget Christie is an English stand-up comedian, actress and writer who grew up in Gloucester and began stand-up in 2004. Her feminist-themed show A Bic for Her won the 2013 Edinburgh Comedy Award for Best Show and became one of the defining comedy shows of the decade. She later wrote and starred in the Channel 4 comedy drama The Change.

timeline.ev: A Bic for Her wins the Edinburgh Comedy Award
Because You Demanded It named Guardian comedy of the year
Netflix special Stand Up for Her released
Writes and stars in Channel 4 series The Change

accolades: Edinburgh Comedy Award Best Show, A Bic for Her (2013)
South Bank Sky Arts Award for Best Comedy (2014)
